title: Here Are the 2026 Grammys Winners: Full List
text: Bad Bunny won Album of the Year for DeBÍ TiRAR MáS FOToS at the 2026 Grammy Awards. According to Billboard, all eight nominees had never won in the category before, but Bad Bunny is now the reigning champ. This marked a significant moment, as the publication highlighted that first-time Album of the Year nominees competed alongside established veterans in what proved to be a historically noteworthy race. The night's biggest winner was Kendrick Lamar with five wins, including a second consecutive Record of the Year win with Luther and a sweep in the Rap categories, winning Best Rap Album for GNX. His fourth five-win Grammy night in his career, Lamar surpassed Jay-Z to become the most-awarded hip-hop artist in Grammy Awards history. Bad Bunny followed with three wins total, including Album of the Year for Debí Tirar Más Fotos, becoming the first Spanish-language album and third Latino artist to receive the honor. Other major winners included SZA for Record of the Year alongside Kendrick Lamar, Billie Eilish for Song of the Year, and Olivia Dean for Best New Artist.
